skill_text:
Transformer text-to-speech model from fairseq S^2. French, single-speaker male voice. Pre-trained on Common Voice v7, fine-tuned on CSS10. Framework: Fairseq. Functionality: Text-to-Speech. API call: load_model_ensemble_and_task_from_hf_hub('facebook/tts_transformer-fr-cv7_css10'). This tool has no required input fields.
When to use:
- Use `fairseq__facebook_tts_transformer_fr_cv7_css10__load_model_ensemble_an_a6feac86` when the user's request directly matches this tool's purpose.
- This tool has no required input fields.
When not to use:
- Do not call this tool when required inputs are missing or ambiguous.
- Do not invent unsupported parameters or unsupported enum values.
- Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
- Do not use when required inputs are missing.
